    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 2.0.0 for removal in 3.0.0 — internal tool execution in BedrockProxyChatModel is superseded by ToolCallingAdvisor used via ChatClient.

    • toolCallingManager

      @Deprecated(since="2.0.0", forRemoval=true) public BedrockProxyChatModel.Builder toolCallingManager(ToolCallingManager toolCallingManager)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      since 2.0.0 for removal in 3.0.0 — internal tool execution in BedrockProxyChatModel is superseded by ToolCallingAdvisor used via ChatClient.
      Sets the tool calling manager used for internal tool execution.
      Parameters:
      toolCallingManager - the tool calling manager
      Returns:
      this builder
